name: AVEO - 510 Easy-Press Plastic Barrel Mouthpiece
summary: Introducing the AVEO Industrial Series Easy-Press Mouthpiece, a top-fill vaporiser cartridge designed for the cannabis industry.
description: Introducing the AVEO Industrial Series Easy-Press Mouthpiece, a top-fill vaporiser cartridge designed for the cannabis industry. Choose from black or white colour options, with easy-press or press release compatibility. Our child-resistant and locking features ensure a secure and hygienic seal, preventing leakage and maintaining the integrity of cannabis oil. Customisation options are also available for a premium finish. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
